## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Galileo and GrowthX to discuss content strategy, performance updates, and future plans.](https://fathom.video/share/uB4xR12gau9w33nWhs5aGJoDUtKwydtn?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Performance data shows a steep drop in sessions, likely due to a Google data issue rather than actual traffic loss](https://fathom.video/share/uB4xR12gau9w33nWhs5aGJoDUtKwydtn?tab=summary&timestamp=287.0)
  - [Content strategy through end of year focuses on refreshes, core pillars, and model hub pages](https://fathom.video/share/uB4xR12gau9w33nWhs5aGJoDUtKwydtn?tab=summary&timestamp=164.0)
  - [Additional work streams like competitor pages and Reddit content to be explored, potentially as separate engagements](https://fathom.video/share/uB4xR12gau9w33nWhs5aGJoDUtKwydtn?tab=summary&timestamp=1002.0)
  - [Team aligned on shifting to less manual review for non-critical content to increase publishing velocity](https://fathom.video/share/uB4xR12gau9w33nWhs5aGJoDUtKwydtn?tab=summary&timestamp=548.0)

## Topics

### Performance Update

  - [Delivered 8 articles last week, published 6, with 24 awaiting review](https://fathom.video/share/uB4xR12gau9w33nWhs5aGJoDUtKwydtn?tab=summary&timestamp=234.0)
  - [Steep drop in sessions across all channels, likely a Google data issue:](https://fathom.video/share/uB4xR12gau9w33nWhs5aGJoDUtKwydtn?tab=summary&timestamp=287.0)
      - [Drop proportional across Galileo blog and overall site](https://fathom.video/share/uB4xR12gau9w33nWhs5aGJoDUtKwydtn?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)
      - [No changes in keyword rankings or positions](https://fathom.video/share/uB4xR12gau9w33nWhs5aGJoDUtKwydtn?tab=summary&timestamp=356.0)
      - [Non-branded impressions rose, contradicting a real traffic drop](https://fathom.video/share/uB4xR12gau9w33nWhs5aGJoDUtKwydtn?tab=summary&timestamp=380.0)
  - [Galileo now has 334 keywords in top 10, closing gap with competitor Arise (880)](https://fathom.video/share/uB4xR12gau9w33nWhs5aGJoDUtKwydtn?tab=summary&timestamp=437.0)

### Content Strategy Through EOY

  - [Focus on 3 main areas:](https://fathom.video/share/uB4xR12gau9w33nWhs5aGJoDUtKwydtn?tab=summary&timestamp=164.0)
    1.  Optimizing existing content (refreshes)
    2.  Filling content gaps in core pillars
    3.  Developing model hub pages
  - [Timeline:](https://fathom.video/share/uB4xR12gau9w33nWhs5aGJoDUtKwydtn?tab=summary&timestamp=164.0)
      - [Sept-Oct: Prioritize keywords from shared sheet and competitor gaps](https://fathom.video/share/uB4xR12gau9w33nWhs5aGJoDUtKwydtn?tab=summary&timestamp=164.0)
      - [Oct-Nov: Continue planned topics, launch Model Hub pages](https://fathom.video/share/uB4xR12gau9w33nWhs5aGJoDUtKwydtn?tab=summary&timestamp=164.0)
      - [Dec: Monitor performance, refresh as needed, close competitor gaps](https://fathom.video/share/uB4xR12gau9w33nWhs5aGJoDUtKwydtn?tab=summary&timestamp=164.0)

### Additional Work Streams

  - [Competitor pages identified as potential next focus](https://fathom.video/share/uB4xR12gau9w33nWhs5aGJoDUtKwydtn?tab=summary&timestamp=1002.0)
  - [Reddit content strategy to be developed](https://fathom.video/share/uB4xR12gau9w33nWhs5aGJoDUtKwydtn?tab=summary&timestamp=1002.0)
  - [Team to explore programmatic content creation for faster scaling](https://fathom.video/share/uB4xR12gau9w33nWhs5aGJoDUtKwydtn?tab=summary&timestamp=1002.0)

### Process Changes

  - [Shifting to less manual review for non-critical content](https://fathom.video/share/uB4xR12gau9w33nWhs5aGJoDUtKwydtn?tab=summary&timestamp=548.0)
  - [Only keeping human review for competitor content and crucial keywords](https://fathom.video/share/uB4xR12gau9w33nWhs5aGJoDUtKwydtn?tab=summary&timestamp=548.0)
  - [Will update Airtable to flag content that can be published without review](https://fathom.video/share/uB4xR12gau9w33nWhs5aGJoDUtKwydtn?tab=summary&timestamp=548.0)

## Next Steps

  - [GrowthX to start tagging content suitable for Reddit](https://fathom.video/share/uB4xR12gau9w33nWhs5aGJoDUtKwydtn?tab=summary&timestamp=1440.0)
  - [Conor to share updated ICP and messaging information this week](https://fathom.video/share/uB4xR12gau9w33nWhs5aGJoDUtKwydtn?tab=summary&timestamp=1861.0)
  - [GrowthX to prepare proposal for competitor pages work stream](https://fathom.video/share/uB4xR12gau9w33nWhs5aGJoDUtKwydtn?tab=summary&timestamp=1002.0)
  - [Jackson to review and potentially reorder content priorities in shared sheet](https://fathom.video/share/uB4xR12gau9w33nWhs5aGJoDUtKwydtn?tab=summary&timestamp=548.0)
  - [Team to discuss renewal (due Oct 3rd) and potential changes to scope of work](https://fathom.video/share/uB4xR12gau9w33nWhs5aGJoDUtKwydtn?tab=summary&timestamp=1298.0)
  - [GrowthX to update content artifacts with new ICP info for review next week](https://fathom.video/share/uB4xR12gau9w33nWhs5aGJoDUtKwydtn?tab=summary&timestamp=1885.0)
